metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The land sleeps under an enchantment. Gather the awakening crystals from the dungeons and bring them to the shrine in Galecrest to break the spell.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Galecrest
towns.description: A quiet hamlet nestled among rolling hills, known for its warm hearths.

key_dungeons.name: Iron Mines
key_dungeons.description: Thick vines choke the mouth of Iron Mines. Beyond them, torchlight flickers in the gloom.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Retrieve the Copper Key from Iron Mines
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A powerful artifact lies in the deepest chamber.
